appliedUpdates.description: Created user-testing.md with simulator details, test commands, test file → assertion mapping, concurrency guidance (max 1), and known limitations (FamilyActivityPicker requires entitlement, DeviceActivity callbacks not triggerable in simulator)

testingNotes.unitTests: 143 tests across 41 suites — all passed. Test host crashed during initial loading and xcodebuild auto-restarted; all tests passed in the restarted run. This is a simulator initialization race condition, not a test logic failure.
testingNotes.uiTests: 35 tests across 5 suites — all passed. EXIT_CODE 0. Total duration ~350s.
testingNotes.knownLimitation: VAL-FOCUS-005: FamilyActivityPicker cannot be presented in simulator without Family Controls entitlement. Unit tests for token persistence (the testable portion) passed. This limitation is documented in mission README.
